name: expert-bug-fixer
description: Bug fixing expert v2.1 (optimized). Precise location, scope control, minimal changes, standard delivery, root cause verification, risk assessment. Enhanced with debug decision tree, code conflict detector, hypothesis confidence scoring, and case knowledge base. Optimized: SKILL.md compressed 29% (523→351 lines), detailed examples moved to config/ for on-demand loading. Invoke when users describe bugs, errors, display anomalies, or need minor fixes. 支持中文触发：修复Bug、线上问题、改一下、报错了、显示不对、接口404、数据不对、页面空白。

changes: Removed redundant Appendix A quick reference card
Moved detailed validation examples to config/hypothesis-validation.md
Merged Step 5+6 into concise summaries (92→15 lines)
